old: Emergency includes flooding, active alarm, and power outage.
Non-emergency requests are logged with caller name, number, and issue summary.
new: Emergency includes flooding, active alarm, and power outage.
Non-emergency requests are logged with caller name, number, and issue summary.
Non-emergency work orders should still gather name, phone, address, and issue details.

changes.old: Emergency includes flooding, active alarm, and power outage.
Non-emergency requests are logged with caller name, number, and issue summary.
changes.new: Non-emergency work orders should still gather name, phone, address, and issue details.

changes.old: If no answer after 40 seconds, notify on-call supervisor and assure immediate follow-up.
changes.new: If transfer fails, confirm on-call dispatch callback within 10 minutes.

old: Never create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade; dispatch creates them manually.
new: Never create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade; dispatch creates them manually.
Do not create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade and do not auto-close open tickets.

changes.old: During office hours (Monday-Sunday 12:00 AM-11:59 PM local timezone), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.
changes.new: During office hours (Monday-Sunday 12:00 AM-11:59 PM ET), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.

conflicts.incoming: Non-emergency work orders should still gather name, phone, address, and issue details.
